validation_rules.Passport: Must contain at least 1 blank page on both sides for visa vignette.
validation_rules.CAS: Must have a unique reference number issued by licensed sponsor. Must be used within 6 months of issuance.
validation_rules.Bank Statements: Funds must cover outstanding 1st year tuition plus living expenses: £1,334 per month (up to 9 months, £12,006 total) in London, or £1,023 per month (£9,207 total) outside London. Funds must have been held consecutively for at least 28 days.
validation_rules.Tuberculosis (TB) Test: Mandatory if applying from countries listed by UK Government (e.g. India).

critical_rules: Verify the 28-day consecutive holding rule for financial statements.
CAS must be marked as active and valid in sponsor register.
Verify Tuberculosis certificate is from UK government-approved medical center.
ai_instructions: Pay extreme attention to the 28-day rule. The bank statement must not show any balance drop below the minimum threshold at any point during those 28 days.
pass_examples: Bank balance shows £15,000 held consecutively for 30 days without dropping, active CAS statement attached.
fail_examples: Bank balance dropped below minimum for 1 day in the middle of the 28-day window, CAS is older than 6 months.
